PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bennett appeared by telephone for Lorayne Jacobes (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue of how a will could be admitted to probate without appointing an Administrator, informed Counsel that he has to comly with Probate Code 8002, and that he has to amend the petition, re-publish and re-notice. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed was continued to August 14, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bennett will appear by telephone.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Continued To Jul-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed was continued to July 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
